_template.name: FluxNova: AI Agent Orchestration
_template.description: FluxNova BPM platform orchestrating autonomous AI agents with LLM inference, guardrails, and callable tools — AIGF governance controls pre-applied
_template.author: CalmStudio Contributors

nodes.name: FluxNova Platform
nodes.description: Full FluxNova BPM platform deployment hosting the AI agent orchestration process

nodes.name: FluxNova BPM Engine
nodes.description: Core BPMN 2.0 / DMN 1.3 engine orchestrating AI agent task dispatch, monitoring, and human-in-the-loop escalation workflows

audit-logging.description: All AI agent task dispatches, LLM calls, guardrail verdicts, and tool invocations are recorded in an immutable audit log

nodes.name: FluxNova REST API
nodes.description: RESTful API layer for AI process deployment, agent task polling, and result submission

nodes.name: FluxNova Cockpit
nodes.description: Process monitoring dashboard for AI agent task instances, LLM latency, guardrail rejection rates, and escalation incidents

nodes.name: FluxNova Admin
nodes.description: Management console for AI agent configuration, LLM model version management, and guardrail policy administration

nodes.name: FluxNova Tasklist
nodes.description: Human-in-the-loop task UI for reviewing AI agent decisions, approving high-risk actions, and resolving guardrail rejections

nodes.name: Process Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing AI agent process definitions, runtime state, LLM interaction history, and AIGF audit logs

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.description: Autonomous AI agent executing tasks assigned by the FluxNova process engine — uses LLM for reasoning, tools for action, and guardrails for safety

agent-least-privilege.description: AI agent operates with least-privilege tool access — only tools explicitly granted per process definition are callable

nodes.name: Large Language Model
nodes.description: Large language model providing inference and reasoning capabilities for AI agent decisions — version-pinned for reproducible behaviour

model-version-pinning.description: LLM model version is pinned to a specific checkpoint — no automatic model upgrades without governance review and regression testing

nodes.name: AI Guardrail
nodes.description: Safety filter validating AI agent inputs and outputs against policy — rejects hallucinations, PII leakage, prompt injections, and policy violations before action

nodes.name: AI Tool
nodes.description: Callable function exposed to the AI agent for structured external actions — wraps downstream APIs, databases, and services with typed schemas and access controls

relationships.description: Engine persists AI agent process state, LLM interaction history, and audit data to the process database
REST API delegates all requests to the embedded engine via internal Java API calls
Cockpit queries AI agent process instances and LLM performance metrics via the REST API
Admin manages AI agent configuration, model versions, and guardrail policies via the REST API
Tasklist retrieves and completes human-in-the-loop review and escalation tasks via the REST API
FluxNova platform contains the BPM engine
FluxNova platform contains the REST API
FluxNova platform contains the Cockpit monitoring app
FluxNova platform contains the Admin management app
FluxNova platform contains the Tasklist app
FluxNova platform contains the process database
Engine dispatches AI agent tasks via the external task worker pattern — agent polls for tasks, executes, and submits results
AI agent sends prompts and context to the LLM for reasoning and decision generation
Guardrail validates agent inputs before LLM invocation and agent outputs before tool execution — acts as a safety filter in the critical path
AI agent invokes callable tools for structured external actions after guardrail approval
